title: Verify content in 'Engagement' section updates based on consumption
description: Tests the logic of the Engagement section, showing acquired content until 90% consumption and then switching to recommendations.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort and has acquired content but not watched it.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner and observe the 'Engagement' section. It should show the acquired content.
2. Watch the acquired content to over 90% completion.

expected_result: After watching the content past 90%, the 'Engagement' section should no longer show the acquired content but instead display the 'top 1 content in similar genre' as a recommendation.
